description: Unified Odoo plugin hooks — core file protection, inline JS blocking, version detection, and domain-specific advisories

hooks.prompt: docker-compose file was modified. Recreate containers: `docker compose up -d` or `docker compose down && docker compose up -d` if service definitions changed.
Dockerfile was modified. Rebuild: `docker compose build && docker compose up -d` (add --no-cache for clean rebuild).
nginx.conf was modified. Test and reload: `docker compose exec nginx nginx -t && docker compose exec nginx nginx -s reload`. Ensure proxy_mode = True in odoo.conf.
.env modified. Must recreate: `docker compose down && docker compose up -d` (restart does NOT pick up .env changes).
entrypoint.sh modified. Ensure executable: `chmod +x entrypoint.sh && docker compose build && docker compose up -d`.
__manifest__.py modified. Bump version. Security order: groups XML > ir.model.access.csv > rules XML. Include report/template XMLs. Update module with -u, run tests with --test-enable.
Model file changed. Ensure class imported in models/__init__.py, access rules in ir.model.access.csv, sudo() justified. Update module with -u.
requirements.txt modified. Local: pip install -r requirements.txt. Docker: docker compose build && docker compose up -d.
Odoo config modified. Restart server. Verify: data_dir, workers, proxy_mode, gevent_port.
Controller changed. Verify: @http.route() has explicit auth= and csrf protection. Consider HttpCase test.
Access CSV modified. Verify: model_id:id format (model_ prefix, dots to underscores) and group references.
Wizard changed. TransientModel requires ir.model.access.csv with perm_create=1, perm_unlink=1.

Email template changed. Verify: body_html (not body), subject uses {{ object.name }}, body uses t-out (not t-esc in 15+), report_template_ids M2M (17+), email_to/partner_to set, file in __manifest__.py data list.

QWeb report changed. Verify: report_type=qweb-pdf, t-call web.html_container wrapper, web.external_layout for header/footer, content in div.page, monetary t-options, page-break-before for multi-page. Arabic/RTL requires web.html_container for UTF-8.
Test file modified. New file? Ensure tests/__init__.py imports it. Run coverage: /odoo-test coverage. SavepointCase removed in Odoo 16+, use TransactionCase.
